name: Steel Fight
short_description: Steel Fight is a fighting game with simplistic gameplay, unique characters and levels, inspired by thematics of medieval and asian. Choose one of characters. Travel to the world where the steel is the only weapon. Enjoy beautiful stages and face unique opponents.
detailed_description:
Steel Fight is a fighting game with simplistic gameplay, unique characters and levels, inspired by thematics of medieval and asian. Choose one of characters. Travel to the world where the steel is the only weapon. Enjoy beautiful stages and face unique opponents.

Features

  • Fast and exciting fights
  • Unique characters and stages
  • Adjustable challenge with difficulty levels
  • Enjoy the game in Arcade mode
  • Enjoy with another player in Versus mode
